boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations execute the privacy-regulated export?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Cannot ALLOW: source boundary not closed before execution.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: DPIA-HEL-088 warning: 'privacy status must be separately verified before transfer' — no source document attests to completion of this separate verification.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE required: DPIA-HEL-088 explicitly reserves privacy-status verification as separate pending requirement, never fulfilled by any cited source.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: DPIA-HEL-088 temporal scope: planning only. REL-HEL-088 authority scope: transfer parameters. No source covers privacy-status class verification before transfer.

critical_features_preserved: Privacy-status class as separate requirement under STD-HEL-088-P
Action boundary match to export question
final_answer: ESCALATE. The privacy-regulated export may not proceed because DPIA-HEL-088 explicitly warns that privacy status must be separately verified before transfer, yet no source document attests this separate verification occurred. REL-HEL-088 covers transfer parameters but does not fulfill the reserved privacy-status class requirement. STD-HEL-088-P mandates privacy-status class closure before execution. Source boundary remains open.
open_blockers: DPIA-HEL-088 reserves privacy-status class verification as unexecuted prerequisite
No source document attests privacy-status class verification completed before transfer
Export cannot proceed until separate privacy-status verification source exists
